# AUDIT_ONLY (Repo-Grounded, No Edit)

Use this prompt to run a deterministic audit-only pass.

Constraints:
- No edits.
- No staging.
- No commit.
- Repo-grounded evidence only.

Output format (A-H):
A. Executive Summary
B. Scope examined
C. Locked facts
D. Root cause / not proven
E. Minimal next step
F. Validation needed
G. Risks / limits
H. Final verdict

Quality bar:
- Separate what is proven vs not proven.
- Stop on uncertainty instead of guessing.
